stages.title: Site Layout
stages.narration: Stage 1. Site layout. An 8 by 6 meter advanced interlocking hollow block house is set out on a 1 meter structural grid with verified drainage and bearing capacity.
stages.explanation: Site layout establishes grid, footprint dimensions and construction reference before excavation.

stages.title: Excavation
stages.narration: Stage 2. Excavation. Foundation trenches are cut to 1 meter depth exposing competent bearing stratum on all four sides.
stages.explanation: Continuous strip trenches align with wall centerlines and structural grid.

stages.title: Foundation Reinforcement
stages.narration: Stage 3. Foundation reinforcement. Rebar cages and cover blocks are placed in trenches before concrete placement.
stages.explanation: Foundation reinforcement provides continuity and ductility at the base of the structure.

stages.title: Footing Concrete
stages.narration: Stage 4. Footing concrete. Strip footings are cast continuously below all load-bearing walls.
stages.explanation: 600 mm wide strip footings spread wall loads to bearing soil.

stages.title: Foundation Wall
stages.narration: Stage 5. Foundation wall. Masonry courses in the trench bring the foundation up to plinth beam level.
stages.explanation: Foundation wall transfers loads from plinth beam to strip footings.

stages.title: Plinth Beam
stages.narration: Stage 6. Plinth beam. Continuous RC beam with reinforcement cage ties the foundation at 450 mm plinth height.
stages.explanation: Plinth beam reduces differential settlement and anchors vertical bars.

stages.title: DPC Layer
stages.narration: Stage 7. DPC layer. Continuous waterproof membrane is placed above the plinth beam.
stages.explanation: DPC prevents capillary moisture rise into hollow block walls.

stages.title: Interlocking Blocks
stages.narration: Stage 8. Interlocking blocks. Hollow blocks are laid course-by-course from the staging pallet. Each block travels, rotates, aligns and snaps into place.
stages.explanation: 230 mm hollow interlocking blocks with staggered bond and corner interlocking.

stages.title: Vertical Reinforcement
stages.narration: Stage 9. Vertical reinforcement. Steel bars are inserted into hollow cores, anchored in foundation and connected to bands.
stages.explanation: 12 mm bars in grouted cores provide seismic ductility and wall continuity.

stages.title: Lintel Band
stages.narration: Stage 10. Lintel band. Reinforced concrete band with rebar cage is cast continuously around all openings.
stages.explanation: Lintel band prevents wall separation during earthquake loading.

stages.title: Roof Band
stages.narration: Stage 11. Roof band. Seismic roof band is cast around the entire perimeter at wall top.
stages.explanation: Roof band with lintel band creates box action for earthquake load sharing.

stages.title: Roof Structure
stages.narration: Stage 12. Roof structure. Lightweight steel trusses, purlins, bracing and connections assembled at 15 degree slope.
stages.explanation: Steel truss system spans 8 meters with purlins and diagonal bracing.

stages.title: Roof Cover
stages.narration: Stage 13. Roof cover. Metal sheets and fasteners complete the lightweight roof diaphragm.
stages.explanation: Roof sheets span between purlins; fixings resist wind uplift.

stages.title: Final Inspection
stages.narration: Stage 14. Final inspection. Structural system, load paths and reinforcement continuity are verified.
stages.explanation: Engineering inspection confirms resilience compliance before occupancy.

stages.title: Completed Structure
stages.narration: Stage 15. Completed structure. Advanced interlocking hollow block house ready for NDMA resilient housing demonstration.
stages.explanation: Fully assembled 8×6 m resilient house with grouted cores, RC bands and steel roof.

footing.title: Strip Footing
footing.purpose: Spreads wall loads over bearing soil at 1 m depth.
footing.resilienceBenefit: Distributes seismic and gravity loads safely to soil.

foundation_wall.title: Foundation Wall
foundation_wall.purpose: Raises foundation to plinth beam level in trench.
foundation_wall.resilienceBenefit: Provides uniform bearing for plinth beam.

plinth_beam.title: Plinth Beam
plinth_beam.purpose: Continuous RC tie at 450 mm plinth height.
plinth_beam.resilienceBenefit: Reduces differential settlement and anchors vertical bars.

dpc.title: DPC Layer
dpc.resilienceBenefit: Protects walls from moisture and moderate flood capillary rise.

interlocking_block.title: Interlocking Hollow Block
interlocking_block.purpose: 230 mm load-bearing wall with mechanical interlock.
interlocking_block.resilienceBenefit: Dry-stack keys reduce sliding; hollow cores accept reinforcement.

vertical_reinforcement.title: Vertical Reinforcement
vertical_reinforcement.purpose: 12 mm bars in hollow cores connected to bands.
vertical_reinforcement.resilienceBenefit: Provides ductility and prevents corner separation in earthquakes.

grouted_core.title: Grouted Reinforcement Cell
grouted_core.resilienceBenefit: Creates reinforced pier for seismic load transfer.

lintel_band.title: Lintel Band
lintel_band.purpose: Continuous RC ring at opening level.
lintel_band.resilienceBenefit: Prevents wall separation during seismic shaking.

roof_band.title: Roof Band
roof_band.purpose: Seismic tie at wall top creating box action.
roof_band.resilienceBenefit: Enables walls to act as integrated box under lateral load.

roof_truss.title: Steel Roof Truss
roof_truss.purpose: Lightweight framing at 15° slope spanning 8 m.
roof_truss.resilienceBenefit: Light diaphragm reduces seismic mass; bracing resists wind.

roof_cover.title: Roof Sheet
roof_cover.resilienceBenefit: Completes diaphragm for load transfer to walls.
